ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Profile.Name <> 'SW Billing', $Profile.Name <> 'SW Billing Extended', OR( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Technical_Solutions', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Managed_Services' ), ISCHANGED(Approved_by_Finance__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Approved by Finance can be changed only by the Finance team
